# ucode module
> ucode module: debug > **Live docs:** https://ucode.mein.io/module-debug.html --- Debugger Module This module provides runtime debug functionality for ucode scripts.
> **Total Context:** ~80860 tokens

## Recommended Entry Points

- [map.md](./map.md): Structural map for ucode that prioritizes quick orientation and symbol discovery. (~4110 tokens, l3-skeleton)
- [bundled-reference.md](./bundled-reference.md): Complete monolithic reference for ucode when a larger context window is available. (~81066 tokens, l4-monolith)

## Tooling Surfaces

- [types/ucode.d.ts](./types/ucode.d.ts): TypeScript declarations for IDE navigation and static analysis of ucode. (~3242 tokens, l3-ide-schema)
